Service Area: Buckhead, Lindbergh, Brookhaven, Chamblee, English Ave community
Population Focus: Homeless outdoors, men, woman, youth, LGBTQIA
Meal Distribution Schedule: Friday noon-6pm,  Sat noon -5pm, Sunday noon -4pm
Donation Acceptance Schedule: Random times depending on need and Volunteers schedules
Seasonal Details: Needs are based on homeless population in our area on any given day can change
Impact Story: These sandwiches are life lines to the homeless communities and individuals we serve. We have been told that when someone has been sick and could get up they were thankful for the PB&J sandwiches and that was all they had and helped survive until they got well enough to get up and pursue resources to get a hot meal. :)
Impact Photos: Let me know if you want pics
Additional Info: THANK YOU, THANK YOU, THANK YOU for ALL everyone does at Sandwich Project to make it possible to feed so many hungry people.

Population Focus: Homeless men and women and children
Meal Distribution Schedule: We serve breakfast lunch and dinner to homeless families daily
Donation Acceptance Schedule: you know I’m gonna serve breakfast at 7 AM lunch around 12 noon and dinner around 7:30
Impact Story: these sandwiches have helped our clients and all walks to life not only those that we serve in our actual center, but homeless families and individuals that walk in that may be living in their cars or other places in the community that come in just for prepared meals and food the sandwiches have been a great help

Meal Distribution Schedule: We serve meals three times a day. 350+ meals each meal.
Delivery Feedback: More heads up. We usually get a notification when the delivery is on the way or the day before. If we could have a longer lead time, that would be best.
Seasonal Details: When the temperatures go below 40 degrees we open our front lobby to become a warming center for another 100+ people.

Restriction Reason: We served those sandwiches to all cleint
Impact Photos: All our pictures are on our social media and you were tagged on them

Population Focus: At risk women and children along the Delk Road corridor
Meal Distribution Schedule:
Hot lunches Tuesday-Saturday 11:30am-2pm.
Sack lunches Monday-Friday 2:30-3:30pm.

Impact Story: The kids enjoy because of after. They get home so late. The sandwich you guys give help to put something on their stomach until they get home.
Impact Photos: Not know, but in the near future yes

Referrals: Change Church - They are starting to explore food programs for their church and have the ability to recruit many volunteers
Impact Story: We try to have hot meals available for our unhoused neighbors, but do run out at times. Being able to provide sandwiches is so helpful. Also particularly helpful for families with kids to be able to provide a sandwich for each child as they wait for their parents to receive food.
